Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

from gitlint: Line exceeds max length (129>80): "This commit adds the description for openstack parameters in example override files under quick start guide documentation section"

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1
> 
> from gitlint: Line exceeds max length (129>80): "This commit adds the description for openstack parameters in example override files under quick start guide documentation section"

Hi Sylvain Desbureaux,
Could you please let me know, do I need to edit the commit message with less than 80 characters to fix this issue?
Thanks,
Rama

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> > Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > from gitlint: Line exceeds max length (129>80): "This commit adds the description for openstack parameters in example override files under quick start guide documentation section"
> 
> Hi Sylvain Desbureaux,
> Could you please let me know, do I need to edit the commit message with less than 80 characters to fix this issue?
> Thanks,
> Rama

Hi Rama,
yes you need to edit  the commit "body" and go to the line when reaching 80 characters (or less if the 80th character is on a word)
Sylvain
